calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Enter Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request for default judgment against Defendant Jamie So a.k.a. Yuenting So a.k.a. Yuen Ting So.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 10:22:45 a.m. and concluding at 10:33:37 a.m. (D505)

Bradford Calvin, Esq. representing Plaintiff QingYe Wang via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff QingYe Wang was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jamie So a.k.a. Yuenting So a.k.a. Yuen Ting So not appearing.

Plaintiff's 1st amended complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts filed October 25, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Jamie So a.k.a. Yuenting So a.k.a. Yuen Ting So on December 22, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Jamie So a.k.a. Yuenting So a.k.a. Yuen Ting So on January 16, 2024.
Dismissal entered as to Does 1 to 10 on September 21, 2023.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action, prayer and to provide proof as to witness testimony.
Court examines the witness.
Witness confirms that statements made, and declarations submitted are true and correct.
Counsel request to update the pre-judgment interest.
Court grants the request to update the pre-judgment interest.
Counsel to present to the Court updated total judgment.

After reviewing the declarations, considering the statements, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case and RULES in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover the following from the Defendants:
Damages $88,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $16,975.00
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $1,641.38
Total Judgment $107,116.38

Proposed Judgment as modified is signed and executed by the Court.
